description: A candid color event photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlay) from the Dodger Stadium naturalization ceremony, a tight crowd shot of people in the stands. Numerous attendees wave small handheld American flags; a woman in a blue jacket and sunglasses at center holds a flag aloft and smiles, others record on smartphones, and one man at right wears a gray t-shirt printed with a red U.S. map and the words 'United... of America.' The crowd is varied in age and dress, with some in masks. The background shows blurred stadium seating and signage. No agency slogan or designed typography appears on the image. The accompanying tweet refers to 2,100 new U.S. citizens from 120 countries. From August 2022.
notable_text: (none designed on image; an attendee's t-shirt reads '...United ... of America'. Tweet celebrates 2,100 new citizens from 120 countries)
